subject: Re: Mr. Epstein
body:
the question is where are we today exactly.. 


----- Original Message ----
From: Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: Doug Schoettle <daschoettle@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, November 16, 2007 8:56:08 AM
Subject: FW: Mr. Epstein


Please advise
 
Rich Kahn
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, NY 10022
tel  212-891-6430
fax 212-750-2408
 
From: Doug Stine [mailto:doug@molyneuxstudio.com] 
Sent: Friday, November 16, 2007 8:02 AM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: Re: Mr. Epstein
 
Dear Rich
1. A full scale mock-up of the libraryis being fabricated right now and will be completed January 30th. This will compose of the 1st and 2nd floors with all details. This mock-up is similar to the office mock-up that was done about 6 months ago.
2. The pool woodworking is on hold since it will now be used in the main house. Mr Epstein is aware of this according to Mr Molyneux.
I hope this helps.
Doug

----- Original Message -----
From: Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>
To: Doug Stine; dougdstine@aol.com <dougdstine@aol.com>
Sent: Thu Nov 15 17:07:37 2007
Subject: re: Mr. Epstein

Can you please update me on status of library and pool woodworking.

Thank you



Rich Kahn

fax 212-750-2408
